title: Trusted Pack
description: Trusted Pack is the resource pack created by and for the Trusted SMP by SGC. Most textures are vanilla, but there are some hidden references to Trusted.
body:
**Trusted Pack** is the resourcepack created by and for the Trusted SMP by SGC. Most textures are vanilla, but there are some hidden refrences to Trusted. To realy enjoy this pack however we recommend installing the mods ETF, EMF and CIT Resewn.
# What is Trusted Pack?
**[ENG]** Trusted Pack is the official member-created Resourcepack that is used on the **[Trusted SMP](https://findmcserver.com/server/90gqtrusted)** hosted by **[Onlineföreningen SGC](https://discord.sgc.se/)**. It adds references to Trusted through paintings, and renamed items. Most of the changes in Trusted Pack is invisible untill you rename an item. This is so that any player can use any resourcepack they like togehter with Trusted Pack.

**[SWE]** Trusted Pack är det officiella medlemsskapade Resurspaketet som används på **[Trusted SMP](https://findmcserver.com/server/90gqtrusted)** som hålls av **[Onlineföreningen SGC](https://discord.sgc.se/)**. Den lägger till referenser till Trusted genom tavlor och omdöpta items. De flesta ändringar i Trusted Pack är osynliga tills du döper om ett item. Detta är för att spelare ska kunna använda vilket annat Resurspaket som helst tillsammans med Trusted Pack.


# Dependencies
**[ENG]** Without these three mods, or mods with equivilant functionality, some textures will not show up in game.

**[SWE]** Utan dessa mods, eller mods med likvärdiga funktioner kommer vissa texturer inte att synas i spelet.
- **[[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)**
- **[[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)**
- **[CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)**

**[ENG]** If you don't want the hassle of having to install these mods yourself, we can recommend the modpack **[WikiRaze's Recommended](https://modrinth.com/modpack/wikiraze)** which comes with the Trusted Pack and it's dependencies pre-installed.

**[SWE]** Ifall du inte vill krångla med att installera dessa mods själv kan vi rekommendera modpacket **[WikiRaze's Recommended](https://modrinth.com/modpack/wikiraze)** som kommer med Trusted Pack och dessa mods färdiginstallerade.
